---
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
---

My passions include computation, infrastructure and research. I currently use these skills to help audit the UK Government. At UoW I wrote software, taught, and supported researchers.

## Experience

GIAA | Data Analytics Specialist | 2023 - present

UoW |Senior RSE | 2021 - 2023

UoW |Senior Academic Technologist | 2019 - 2021

## Education

UoW | PhD Psychology | 2011 - 2015

UoW | BSc Psychology | 2007 - 2011
